metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5274
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1a,b: Mind Bomb-1 (MIB1) was identified in PSD biochemical fractions by by mass-spectrometry and MIB1 was enriched in PSD fraction as compared to synaptosomal and presynaptic fractions from Rat forebrains.

Figure 1c-e: confocal imaging of immunofluorescence labeling for MIB1 and PSD-95 (DLG4) in 21DIV cultured hippocampal neurons showed partial co-localization.

Figure 1j: immunoelectron microscopy of MIB1 confirmed localization to PSD and nearby vesicle-like structures in adult mouse cortex.. Experimental description: Results, Figure 1 legend: "The immunoelectron microscopy of Mib1, using a section of adult mouse cortex and diaminobenzidine as a chromagen"
